---
title: "Yi-Zhi Huang
Department of Mathematics
Rutgers Universtiy
110 Frelinghuysen Road
Piscataway, NJ 08854-8019"
image: images/name-stamp.gif
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: yzhuang@math.rutgers.edu
      href: mailto:yzhuang@math.rutgers.edu
  - 
---

::: {#hero-heading}
